languages.original_text: "I doubt there are many who would wish to find themselves in your personal domain, Master Februs. I, for example, certainly do not."

languages.text: "Не думаю, что нашлось бы много желающих попасть в ваш кабинет, господин Фебрус. Я, к примеру, точно не из их числа".
"I doubt there are many who would wish to find themselves in your personal domain, Master Februs. I, for example, certainly do not."
languages.original_text: "Не думаю, что нашлось бы много желающих попасть в ваш кабинет, господин Фебрус. Я, к примеру, точно не из их числа".

traits.locale_text: "I doubt there are many who would wish to find themselves in your personal domain, Master Februs. I, for example, certainly do not."
"I doubt there are many who would wish to find themselves in your personal domain, Master Februs. I, for example, certainly do not."
"I doubt there are many who would wish to find themselves in your personal domain, Master Februs. I, for example, certainly do not."

languages.text: «Dudo que muchos quisieran encontrarse en su dominio personal, maestro Februs. Yo, desde luego, no».
languages.original_text: "I doubt there are many who would wish to find themselves in your personal domain, Master Februs. I, for example, certainly do not."

traits.locale_text: «Dudo que muchos quisieran encontrarse en su dominio personal, maestro Februs. Yo, desde luego, no».

languages.text: 「あなた様の個人的な領域に身を置きたいと願う者など、そう多くはおりますまい、フェブラス殿。たとえば、この私は、間違いなくお断りいたします」
languages.original_text: "I doubt there are many who would wish to find themselves in your personal domain, Master Februs. I, for example, certainly do not."

traits.locale_text: 「あなた様の個人的な領域に身を置きたいと願う者など、そう多くはおりますまい、フェブラス殿。たとえば、この私は、間違いなくお断りいたします」

languages.text: “我怀疑没多少人愿意置身于你的私人领域，费布鲁斯大人。比如我就肯定不愿意。”
languages.original_text: "I doubt there are many who would wish to find themselves in your personal domain, Master Februs. I, for example, certainly do not."

traits.locale_text: “我怀疑没多少人愿意置身于你的私人领域，费布鲁斯大人。比如我就肯定不愿意。”

languages.text: "Ich denke, die meisten Leute wollen sich nicht in Eurem persönlichen Reich wiederfinden, Meister Februs. Ich zum Beispiel."
languages.original_text: "I doubt there are many who would wish to find themselves in your personal domain, Master Februs. I, for example, certainly do not."

traits.locale_text: "Ich denke, die meisten Leute wollen sich nicht in Eurem persönlichen Reich wiederfinden, Meister Februs. Ich zum Beispiel."

languages.text: « À mon avis, la plupart des gens n'ont aucun désir de se retrouver dans votre espace privé, maître Februs. Pour ma part, je préfère éviter. »
languages.original_text: "I doubt there are many who would wish to find themselves in your personal domain, Master Februs. I, for example, certainly do not."

traits.locale_text: « À mon avis, la plupart des gens n'ont aucun désir de se retrouver dans votre espace privé, maître Februs. Pour ma part, je préfère éviter. »

languages.text: "Kendi kişisel etki alanınızda bulunmayı arzulayan pek fazla kişi olduğundan şüpheliyim Üstat Februs. Mesela ben kesinlikle istemem."
languages.original_text: "I doubt there are many who would wish to find themselves in your personal domain, Master Februs. I, for example, certainly do not."

traits.locale_text: "Kendi kişisel etki alanınızda bulunmayı arzulayan pek fazla kişi olduğundan şüpheliyim Üstat Februs. Mesela ben kesinlikle istemem."
